subject: Cannot access premium features
description: I upgraded to premium yesterday but still cannot access the premium features. My payment was processed successfully according to my bank statement.

subject: API returns 503 errors randomly
description: Our integration with your API is experiencing random 503 Service Unavailable errors. This happens about 10 percent of the time and is affecting our production system.

subject: Incorrect charge on my account
description: I was charged $199 instead of $99 for my monthly plan. I am on the Starter plan but was charged the Professional rate. Please issue a refund for the difference.

subject: Request for Slack integration
description: It would be incredibly useful to have Slack integration for notifications. Currently I have to check the dashboard manually which is not efficient.

subject: Charts not rendering on Safari
description: All charts and graphs appear blank when using Safari browser. This works fine on Chrome and Firefox. Steps to reproduce: Open any dashboard with charts in Safari 17.

subject: Account suspended without notice
description: My account was suspended and I received no email or notification about it. I need access immediately as I have a deadline tomorrow. This is critical for my business.

subject: WebSocket connections dropping
description: Real-time updates are not working because WebSocket connections keep dropping every few minutes. We have to refresh the page constantly to see new data.

subject: Need VAT invoice
description: I need a VAT invoice for all my payments from this year for tax purposes. The current invoices do not show VAT separately. My VAT number is GB123456789.

subject: Batch operations feature
description: We need the ability to perform batch operations on multiple items at once. Currently we have to process items one by one which is very time consuming for large datasets.

subject: Duplicate records being created
description: When I click save the system creates duplicate records. Happens about 50 percent of the time. I now have many duplicate entries that need to be cleaned up.

subject: Two accounts merged incorrectly
description: I had two accounts and requested a merge but some data from my secondary account was lost. Can you restore the missing projects and contacts?

subject: LDAP authentication failing
description: LDAP authentication stopped working after your latest update. Our entire team cannot log in using their corporate credentials. This is blocking all work.

subject: Subscription renewal failed
description: My subscription renewal failed even though I have sufficient funds and my card is valid. I do not want to lose access to my data.

subject: Custom branding options
description: We would like to customize the branding with our company logo and colors. Is this possible on the Enterprise plan? If so how do we set it up?

subject: Timezone display incorrect
description: All timestamps are showing in UTC instead of my local timezone even though I have set it correctly in settings. This is causing confusion with scheduled tasks.

subject: Cannot add team members
description: When I try to invite team members I get an error saying email already in use but they have never signed up. We checked and these emails are definitely not registered.

subject: Webhook delivery delays
description: Our webhook notifications are being delayed by 10 to 15 minutes. We need these to be near real-time for our workflow automation to work properly.

subject: Request itemized billing
description: Can I get itemized billing that shows usage breakdown per user? This would help with our internal cost allocation and budgeting.

subject: GitLab integration needed
description: We use GitLab instead of GitHub. It would be great to have GitLab integration for automatic deployments. Currently only GitHub is supported.

subject: File preview not loading
description: PDF and image previews are not loading. I just see a loading spinner that never completes. Have to download files to view them which is inconvenient.
